---
title: "filterObserve()"
description: "Filter a read-only observe egress stream without turning it into a graph node. The source stream owns ordering and lifecycle; this helper only decides whether to forward each ObserveEvent and returns the source unsubscribe unchanged."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Filter a read-only observe egress stream without turning it into a graph node.

The source stream owns ordering and lifecycle; this helper only decides whether to forward each
ObserveEvent and returns the source unsubscribe unchanged.

## Import

```ts
import { filterObserve } from "@graphrefly/ts/graph";
```

## Signature

```ts
function filterObserve(
	stream: ObserveStream,
	predicate: ObservePredicate,
): ObserveStream
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `stream` | `ObserveStream` | stream value used by the helper. |
| `predicate` | `ObservePredicate` | predicate value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `ObserveStream` value.

## Example

```ts
import { filterObserve } from "@graphrefly/ts/graph";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/inspect.ts`
